import axios from'axios';const BASE_URL='http://localhost:8080';const api=axios.create({baseURL:BASE_URL});// User Service
export const userService={register:userData=>api.post('/users',userData),getAllUsers:()=>api.get('/users'),getUserById:id=>api.get("/users/".concat(id)),updateUser:(id,data)=>api.put("/users/".concat(id),data),deleteUser:id=>api.delete("/users/".concat(id))};
